name: linkedcareer
description: Career management and professional resume generation skill for OpenClaw
longDescription:
LinkedCareer is an open source career management skill for working professionals. It solves the pain points of scattered career experience management, time-consuming resume formatting, and low job application efficiency. It realizes the full process closed loop of "experience recording → intelligent optimization → one-click professional resume generation". It is not only useful when looking for a job, but also an essential tool for daily career management.

Core Features:
- Intelligent guided onboarding to build your career profile in 5 minutes
- Socratic deep dive to automatically extract career highlights, prioritizing the last 5 years of experience
- Regular growth tracking (daily/weekly/monthly) to record achievements
- 3 professional resume templates covering all job search scenarios
- Support exporting Word/Markdown formats, ready to use
- JD matching to optimize resume content for specific roles
- All personal career data is stored locally only, no network upload behavior
author: LinkedCareer Team
